revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image: a crisp 16-bit SNES-style pixel-art game asset sheet.

Hard canvas contract:
- Exact canvas/sheet size: 32x32 px.
- Grid: 1 row x 1 column, one frame only.
- Fill all empty/background pixels with solid #FF00FF chroma key only; no gradients, no transparency, no borders.
- Do not draw grid lines, cell separators, frame borders, numbers, labels, text, UI, logos, or watermarks.
- Keep the entire prop inside the 32x32 cell with a clear solid #FF00FF margin on every edge.
- No detached fragments, dust specks, isolated pixel islands, slivers, or leftover residue.

Subject:
A single top-down Japanese satoyama fantasy RPG field-prop representing a small organic forest-edge boundary overlay cluster: mixed ferns, mossy ground cover, exposed earthy tree roots, tiny rounded shrubs, and soft leaf-shadow patches. Compress the idea of a wide forest-edge band into one readable 32x32 prop tile: thicker in the middle, tapering asymmetrically left and right, soft irregular leafy top edge, bottom edge visually fades into the magenta background using fewer clusters but remains clean and contained.

Style and rendering:
- Crisp low-resolution pixels, no antialiasing blur.
- Consistent warm golden-afternoon palette.
- Deep forest greens #3a6a36 and #2a5a2a, warm yellow-green highlights #8ab84a, earthy brown roots #7a5a38, soft dark green shadow #1a3a1a used sparingly.
- One-pixel dark outline where useful.
- Top-left light source with warm highlights on upper surfaces.
- Top-down map prop, no isometric perspective, no vanishing point.
- Bright cheerful rural fantasy mood.

Originality and exclusions:
No recognizable characters, mascots, logos, likenesses, UI, modern objects, weapons, armor, helmets, ninja/samurai outfits, horror mood, birds, companion creatures, letter emblems, text, or watermark.
